name: graymatter
description: Durable memory, shared graph state, and live api-docs schema awareness for Codex and OpenClaw agents.

interface.shortDescription: Durable memory and live schema context for agents
interface.longDescription: GrayMatter gives Codex and OpenClaw agents a durable memory layer, shared graph context, authenticated awareness of the live ValkyrAI api-0 schema, and a bundled mcp-server for direct tool access. Use it to persist decisions, query context, inspect business objects, and coordinate agent state through ValkyrAI.
defaultPrompt: Use GrayMatter to remember this decision
Inspect the live api-docs schema with GrayMatter
Use GrayMatter to set up analytics context
